overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban street. The player character moves from under an elevated highway, crosses the road, passes a fenced service area with trash accumulation, and approaches the NCPD (Night City Police Department) building entrance while encountering pedestrians and vehicles.

events.description: black sedan passes by on the road as the player approaches the crossing point
player crosses the street from the right sidewalk to the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk under the elevated highway, then crossing the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving down the street away from the camera
black sedan passing quickly along the road

entered.detail: tall modern building with white and dark green paneling and vertical window strips
massive concrete overpass spanning the street overhead with support columns
wet multi-lane asphalt street with red and white painted curbs reflecting streetlights
tall modern street lamp with bright white LED light

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway at night. A white concrete building with green accents runs along the right side while the multi-lane street sits to the left. The area is artificially lit by street lamps, and vehicles including a green car and black sedan pass by on the wet asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced service alley with trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking along the left sidewalk next to a chain-link fence with accumulated trash and debris

entered.detail: green metal chain-link security fence with barbed wire topping running along the sidewalk
accumulated garbage bags, cardboard boxes, and scattered debris piled against the fence
multi-story concrete parking structure visible behind the chain-link fence

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player now walks along a narrower sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence on the left. Behind the fence lies a parking garage structure, while the sidewalk itself is littered with trash bags and debris. The elevated highway is no longer visible, and the area feels more enclosed and service-oriented.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with police precinct entrance

events.description: player passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk
NCPD police officer runs past the player from behind, heading toward the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk toward the NCPD building entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
NCPD officer in tactical armor running past the player toward the street

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful abstract graphics and text
entrance to the Night City Police Department with red neon signage and dark facade
row of parked cars including a white sedan along the right curb
tall commercial building with illuminated windows and ground-level storefronts

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a wider commercial sidewalk approaching the NCPD building entrance. Large digital billboards illuminate the area above the police precinct entrance. The player passes a pedestrian walking the opposite direction and an NCPD officer who runs past in a hurry. Parked vehicles line the right side of the street while commercial buildings rise on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban district, moving from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway toward the brightly lit entrance of a police precinct. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath the highway, where artificial street lamps reflect off wet asphalt as cars pass by a white building with green accents. As the camera crosses the street, the open road gives way to a more enclosed service area, where the path narrows beside a chain-link fence and a parking garage littered with trash bags. The scene then opens up into a wider commercial corridor, shifting from the gritty alleyway to a vibrant plaza illuminated by large digital billboards. Finally, the camera approaches the NCPD building entrance, passing a pedestrian and a rushing police officer amidst a backdrop of towering commercial architecture and parked vehicles.
